items.name_en: Original Miu Miu 5BB142 New Bowling Bag, a main item on the official website, an absolutely explosive style this year 🔥. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern. The bag is exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured. The front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap. Cotton satin lining, with zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers are wearing this style. Size: 22X10.5X7.5Cm, with original packaging

items.name_en: Large
items.name_cn:
Large
MIUMIU Long Handle Baguette Bag
Recently inspired by the trendy long-handle baguette design. The 24 Fall/Winter new arrival revolves around a 'girlish sentiment' with a scholarly vibe. It embodies an uninhibited and elegant young lady's attitude and a casual outlook on life, unique to Miu Miu girls. Not too big or small, just right. Sweet, spicy, or cool. The capacity meets daily needs. Good-looking and practical. Hard not to love it.
Size: Base 28×8×16cm

items.name_en: 5BC158: Miu Miu new arrival, classic Matelasse craftsmanship, top-grade imported lambskin. The refined 3D bag shape and premium texture reinterpret the soft charm of this calfskin handbag. The craftsmanship and design fuse many of Miu Miu's most unique signature elements. Equipped with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, offering multiple carrying styles to add to its fashion appeal and modern style. Cotton satin lining included. Size: 24×11.5×7cm💕(with original packaging)

items.name_en: 5BG306, Miu Miu new tassel drawstring dumpling bag. Imported lambskin with vintage gold hardware. The drawstring closure features fine, dense pleats that look like ruffles, adding a three-dimensional and playful touch. Long dual handles allow for shoulder or hand carrying, or holding it casually at the waist, creating a lazy, casual vibe. Stylish and versatile, perfect for daily outings or commuting.

items.name_en: Top-tier exclusive real shot 📷 M13226 Monogram Heart Bag New arrival NANO SPEEDY DATING Handbag. This Nano Speedy handbag is crafted from the brand's classic Monogram Empreinte leather into a modern compact silhouette, with soft tones highlighting the dazzling metal hardware. The detachable chain strap offers versatile carrying options. Perfect for organizing daily essentials for day or night. 10.5 x 11.5 x 18 cm.

items.name_en: Top-tier exclusive M13678 White. This Twist Slim medium handbag is presented in Epi grained calfskin for a unique texture, while the modern silhouette incorporates the iconic LV Twist lock and dazzling metal hardware. The Toron handle is adorned with the colorful Monogram pattern from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series. 16 x 8 x 23 cm

items.name_en: [LV x TM Marellini Handbag] M13099 Black, M13100 White (Three Colors - Murakami)
items.name_cn:
[LV x TM Marellini Handbag] M13099 Black, M13100 White (Three Colors - Murakami)
This Marellini handbag is crafted from richly textured Epi leather to create a refined silhouette, offering ample space to store daily essentials like smartphones. The round coin purse and mirror are made of colorful Monogram canvas from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series and are secured to the bag body with rugged metal chains.
Size: 13.5 x 6.5 x 19 cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: 💰Suede Edition·
items.name_cn:
💰Suede Edition·
Jamie 4.3 Large POCHON_Tote Bag
Imported Italian soft suede paired with cowhide. The drawstring design creates a natural, high-end wrinkled texture on the bag. The metal chain and logo on the body complement each other perfectly. It gives off a relaxed, stylish vibe. The tote shape is unique and expressive! Extra-large capacity, fits a laptop 💻.
Model: 809824
Size: 27×34×3cm

items.name_en: 【Original Leather】
items.name_cn:
【Original Leather】
A new minimalist bucket bag featuring imported lambskin drawstrings and a signature logo. Large capacity design combining style and practicality. Very spacious. The smooth lambskin texture feels premium. Includes a detachable pouch. Adjustable shoulder strap allows you to switch between a shoulder bag and a crossbody bag. Perfect for various daily occasions. Full of dimensionality. Perfectly interprets understated minimalism~
Model: 804302
Size: 24×30×12cm

24ss Autumn/Winter Limited Briefcase

Model: 817603
Size: 30×33×10cm
